title: The Golden Vault
description: This mod adds a new reason to go exploring! it adds 2 structures and a new Pillager type!
body:
![The Golden Vault Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c51cde38dc0cbcf26aca6758b8dde26a85550ee3.png)

This mod adds:
- 2 new structures
- 1 new mob
- cool stuff all round

I wanted to try to make the new 1.21 vaults on my own. this is how it came out.
To unlock a vault you need a key, and for a key you'll need 3 key pieces.

You can find those key parts in the new structure: Pillager Base
The 3 key parts can be found in barrels and the suspicious gravel located in the structure. 

Craft the 3 key parts into a Golden Key.
The Golden Key can be used on a Golden Vault to get loot from it.
![Vault and Key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72507258b6a4695b32200a39496a94bce51109e0.png)
![The Golden Key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4536a864bda544fac8935f600a347695553fd002.png)

The Golden Vaults are found in the second structure: The Catacombs
There are 4 rooms and many hallways.
The Golden Vaults are only found in some rooms. Right Click on the vaults with the golden key to unlock it and get loot from it.
![The Golden Vaults](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6563f300a4323838af04caaaaf8a5e28aab8a058.png)

credit for the pillager knight model refrence (i didnt copy paste it, i made it on my own. but the image was for refrence so it looks very similliar. their model looks really cool)
[https://twitter.com/ItsMrZedLight/status/1507904128340488196](https://twitter.com/ItsMrZedLight/status/1507904128340488196)

this mod was made with Mcreator so cut me some slack
it is also very hard to update it to different versions
